DescribeLLMServices.serviceName: Filter by application name; returns all applications if not set
DescribeLLMServices.tag: Filter by tag (single selection). key="@@@" means no tag; key="@@@" and value="@@@" means all tags; key="abc" and value="@@@" means all resources with key "abc"
DescribeLLMServices.order: Sort order; default: desc; options: asc (ascending), desc (descending)
